headline: Magnificent Seven Dominate S&P 500 Earnings, But That's Changing Dramatically
summary: The Magnificent Seven will again reign supreme over S&P 500 earnings, but their dominance is fading.  As second-quarter earnings reports start to flow in, analysts expect the Magnificent Seven companies to grow earnings by a combined 31.1%.  The other 493 S&P 500 companies are expected to increase earnings 22.8%, FactSet Senior Earnings Analyst John Butters wrote in a report.

content.title: Magnificent Seven Dominate S&P 500 Earnings, But That's Changing Dramatically
content.summary: The Magnificent Seven will again reign supreme over S&P 500 earnings, but their dominance is fading.  As second-quarter earnings reports start to flow in, analysts expect the Magnificent Seven companies to grow earnings by a combined 31.1%.  The other 493 S&P 500 companies are expected to increase earnings 22.8%, FactSet Senior Earnings Analyst John Butters wrote in a report.

headline: Markets may get 'increasingly nervous' if hyperscalers raise AI capex further
summary: US stocks (^DJI, ^IXIC, ^GSPC) are mixed ahead of Monday's close as investors await the release of second quarter earnings from Alphabet (GOOG, GOOGL), Tesla (TSLA), Intel (INTC), and IBM (IBM) throughout this week. Tematica Research CIO Chris Versace comes on Market Domination to comment on how markets may end up reacting to AI spending forecasts outlined in these upcoming earnings.

content.title: Markets may get 'increasingly nervous' if hyperscalers raise AI capex further
content.description:
US stocks (^DJI, ^IXIC, ^GSPC) are mixed ahead of Monday's close as investors await the release of second quarter earnings from Alphabet (GOOG, GOOGL), Tesla (TSLA), Intel (INTC), and IBM (IBM) throughout this week.

Tematica Research CIO Chris Versace comes on Market Domination to comment on how markets may end up reacting to AI spending forecasts outlined in these upcoming earnings.
content.summary: US stocks (^DJI, ^IXIC, ^GSPC) are mixed ahead of Monday's close as investors await the release of second quarter earnings from Alphabet (GOOG, GOOGL), Tesla (TSLA), Intel (INTC), and IBM (IBM) throughout this week. Tematica Research CIO Chris Versace comes on Market Domination to comment on how markets may end up reacting to AI spending forecasts outlined in these upcoming earnings.
